Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Planetary Security (The Last Horizon)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Planetary Security is an organization that Advocates assist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — Planetary Security automatically transmits warnings to Advocate ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — Planetary Security is scared of Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Planetary Security forces are sometimes insufficient to handle certain villains' weapons.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Planetary Security is an entity on Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Planetary Security controls the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Planetary Security is supported by the Magic Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Planetary Security waved the militia starships through the orbital cordon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — Planetary Security maintains a database.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — Planetary Security issues docking passes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — Planetary Security received an alert at the same time as Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Planetary Security panicked on Fathom.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
